column3: Explain the difference between excluded services and other covered services.”
column4: Excluded services are not reimbursable (e.g. cosmetic surgery dental care routine eye care). Other covered services are reimbursable but may have conditions (e.g. acupuncture bariatric surgery).
column5: Excluded services are not covered by insurance and include procedures such as cosmetic surgery adult dental care infertility treatment long-term care non-emergency care outside the U.S.and private-duty nursing. In contrast other covered services are medical procedures and treatments that are included in the insurance policy and are reimbursable. The key difference is that excluded services are explicitly not included in the policy while covered services are included and eligible for insurance coverage.
